# dischargebar.org

> Guide to bankruptcy discharge waiting periods under Sections 727(a)(8) and 1328(f).

dischargebar.org is a free, open-source educational resource about discharge bars and waiting periods between bankruptcy filings. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://dischargebar.org/: Overview of all discharge waiting periods -- when you can file again
- https://dischargebar.org/chapter-7-discharge.html: Chapter 7 discharge bar -- the 8-year rule under 727(a)(8)
- https://dischargebar.org/chapter-13-discharge.html: Chapter 13 discharge bar -- waiting periods under 1328(f)
- https://dischargebar.org/nondischargeable-debts.html: Debts that survive discharge regardless of waiting periods

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
